name: Layered Zucchini Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, bring water, 2 tablespoons margarine, and salt to a rolling boil.
2. Remove from heat. Stir in sour cream and potato flakes until combined. Add corn; mix well and set aside.
3. In a large skillet, melt 2 tablespoons margarine. Add zucchini and onion. Stir-fry 2-3 minutes until zucchini is crisp-tender.
4. Remove from heat; stir in tomatoes, dill weed, and garlic powder. Spread half of the potato mixture in the bottom of a 2-quart bowl.
5. Spoon half of the zucchini mixture over the potato layer. Repeat with remaining potato and zucchini mixtures, ending with zucchini layer.
6. Cover; refrigerate overnight or several hours before serving.
